Settings

Server Information

RTMP URL: rtmp://your-server:1935/live/{stream-key}

HLS Playback: https://your-server/live/{stream-key}/index.m3u8?token={token}&expires={timestamp}

Embed Player: <iframe src="https://your-server/embed/{stream-key}" width="640" height="360"></iframe>
